channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Israel targeted Gaza children resulting in genocide, UN inquiry says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israel’s deliberate targeting of Palestinian children
- U.N. Report Says Israeli Killings of Gaza Children Post-Truce Amount to Genocide
- Palestinian children targeted in ‘continuing genocide’, say UN investigators
- UN report: Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
- UN: Israel committed genocide by targeting Gaza children
- Israel’s targeting of Gaza children part of genocide: UN
- Israel continues to commit genocide by targeting children in Gaza, UN inquiry finds
- Israel continues to commit genocide, atrocity crimes by deliberately targeting Palestinian children, UN independent commission finds
- U.N. Report Says Israeli Killings of Gaza Children Post-Truce Amount to Genocide
- U.N. says Israel is intentionally targeting Palestinian children
- Israel targeted Gaza children, resulting in genocide, UN inquiry claims
- UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
- Israel’s deliberate targeting of Gaza children part of genocide: UN inquiry
- Israel's 'deliberate targeting' of children part of ongoing Gaza 'genocide': UN probe
- UN inquiry: Israel deliberately targeted Palestinian children as part of genocide
- Israel's 'deliberate targeting' of children part of ongoing Gaza genocide: UN probe
- Palestinian children targeted in genocide, war crimes in Gaza: UN inquiry
- Israel's 'Deliberate Targeting' Of Children Part Of Ongoing Gaza 'Genocide': UN Probe
- Israel continues to commit genocide by targeting Palestinian children, UN says
- Israel’s deliberate targeting of Gaza children part of genocide: UN inquiry
- Israel purposely targeted Gaza children: UN
- UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
- Israel's 'deliberate targeting' of children part of ongoing Gaza 'genocide': UN probe
- Israel deliberately killed Gaza children resulting in genocide: UN probe]]>

- Forty drown across France in heatwave and parts of Spain above 30C at night
- 40 People Drown in France Amid Scorching Temperatures
- Forty drown in France as people seek relief from Europe's heatwave
- France records hottest-ever night as 40 drown trying to escape heatwave
- Forty drown in France as people seek relief from heatwave
- Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
- Forty drown in France as people seek relief from Europe-wide heatwave
- 40 drown in France as people seek relief from Europe's heatwave
- Europe battles brutal heatwave: 18 dead in France as temperatures soar, hotter days likely ahead
- Around 20 drown in France as people seek relief from heatwave]]>

item.title: Pummelled by Ukraine, Russia says US hasn’t delivered on Trump-Putin ‘understandings’
